creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
So, committing this, with changes.

- all the style bugs you added (empty lines, mostly)
- put back everything removed and that works.
- removed https://pkg.freebsd.org/
- all the distfiles mirrors, gentoo, openbsd...
- audio/flac: use sourceforge.
- devel/libuv: site may exist, but distfile does not.
